ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number (EIN) of the organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., H, N, E, G) */,
  "subtype" TEXT /* Subtype of the organization (e.g., H41, N67, E65, G30) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the organization's address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the organization's address */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the organization (e.g., Match, Partial Match) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., Google, IRS) */,
  "flag_keep" INTEGER /* Flag to keep the organization in the dataset (0 or 1) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the current year */,
  "previous_revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the previous year */,
  "revenue_difference" REAL /* Difference in revenue from the previous year */,
  "revenue_difference_percentage" REAL /* Percentage difference in revenue from the previous year */,
  "assets" REAL /* Total assets for the current year */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the current year */,
  "net_assets" REAL /* Net assets for the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtype */,
  "subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtype */,
  "subtype_description" TEXT /* Description of the subtype */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "geospatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geospatial record */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "address_15" TEXT /* Address of the organization in 2015 */,
  "address_12" TEXT /* Address of the organization in 2012 */,
  "address_google" TEXT /* Address of the organization from Google */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the organization's address */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the organization's address */,
  "geolocation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geolocation (in meters) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geospatial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the data quality flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality flag */,
  "flag_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the data quality flag (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the organization data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_corrections" (
  "correction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correction */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was corrected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "correction_date" TEXT /* Date of the correction */,
  "corrected_by" TEXT /* User who made the correction */,
  "correction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the correction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule applied to the field */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the validation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, operational) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "program_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization in the partnership */,
  "partner_org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner organization */,
  "partnership_type" TEXT /* Type of partnership (e.g., funding, collaborative) */,
  "partnership_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the partnership */,
  "partnership_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the partnership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_organization_partnerships_partner_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)
